sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n85067" key="polumh/khs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πολυ-μήκης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ες</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">μῆκος</etym>) <sense id="n85067.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">very long,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">αὐλός</foreign> <abbr TEIform="abbr">v.l. in</abbr> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:4:67" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.67</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
